title: campylospermum angulatum
intro: Campylospermum angulatum, also known as the winged fruit tree, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Campylospermum angulatum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often consumed as a tea, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
